stonetop.summary: The weird three-in-one sisters of the Fen, who always have what you seek — for a price.

system.concept: The weird three-in-one sisters of the Fen, who always have what you seek — for a price.
system.description: Many tales are told of the weird sisters of the Fen. There are always three, but they might be old, young, or middling; tall and regal or twisted and gnarled. All stories agree they have what you seek — an answer, an artifact, a way to do the impossible — and that there's always a price. In truth they are a single entity: the inscrutable incarnation of a primordial being of knowledge, fate, costs, and consequences, greatly diminished and dwelling in this broken land. They observe the old ways of hospitality and do no true harm to a guest who keeps guest-right; violate it, and beware.
